use_cases: Hero background for landing pages with immersive tunnel animation
Visual focal point for tech and SaaS product showcases
Animated hero section for media and entertainment websites
Immersive 3D tunnel effect for creative agency presentations
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered 3D tunnel animation hero component using custom GLSL shaders. The effect renders an infinite perspective tunnel with animated ring layers and glowing points that continuously move forward, creating a sense of depth and motion. Includes responsive mobile detection and optimized rendering with 96 tunnel layers and 128 ring points for smooth performance across devices.
